calendar.matters:
Petition Of Guardian Ad Litem For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; And Petition For Discharge Of Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evan Abrams for Peachie Nacario and Paul Nacario (Trustees)
Ross Madden for Jose Nacario
Lawrence Siracusa Guardian Ad Litem for Maya Nacario

The Court made inquiries as to why age 25 is the trigger date for Trust to be available to the beneficiaries, why funds aren't deposited into blocked accounts, the structure of paragraph 8, bond requirement, provisions about accounting, and Julia's account. Mr. Siracusa responded that age 25 seemed the reasonable choice because age 18 is too young, that bond is expensive, Peachie has the best interest of the children, Maya is getting something she would not have since she was not in the Trust instrument, they would need guardian of estate to object to accountings, Trustees have to account under probate code, and that he is 100% on board with this the settlement agreement. Mr. Madden stated that there are no objections, the settlement agreement was worked on diligently by all, would like to proceed with the settlement agreement, and that he submitted proof of Julia's account yesterday. Mr. Abrams stated that the Trustees have been informed of maintaining trust records separate from family records, that there are 3 separate accounts for each trust share until they are needed for college, and he has no objections to the settlement agreement. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms, etc. is Off Calendar. The Court granted The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Settlement Of The First And Interim Account And Report Of The Trust And Instructions To Equalize The Trusts Final Distributions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evan Abrams for Peachie Nacario and Paul Nacario (Co-Trustees).
Ross Madden for and with Jose Nacario (Beneficiary).
Lawrence Siracusa Guardian Ad Litem for Maya Nacario.

The Court noted that it now has opposition filed challenging validity of the Trust itself. Mr. Abrams stated that it has been six years since the Decedent died and Mr. Nacario never once raised this issue. Mr. Madden stated that they had very little discussion and that mediation may be helpful. Mr. Abrams stated that they have tried time and time again, that there are no liquid assets to pay Attorney expenses and that alternatively, the Court could order sale of the two properties. Mr. Siracusa stated that on behalf of the Ward, he supports mediation. Mr. Abrams asks if distribution to the Minor could be held in Trust. All Counsel indicated no objection to the accounting. The Court grants the petition as it presents the accounting for the interim period and is preserving all other issues. Mr. Abrams is to prepare an accounting order and present it to Mr. Siracusa and Mr. Madden for approval as to form. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 23, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 28, 2018. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on March 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Parties are to talk about how Maya's share will be distributed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Continued To May-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Moallem for Peachy Nacario, Jose Nacario and Paul Nacario.

Ms. Moallem stated that she revised the modifications and provisions, that she is in the process of gathering signatures and that she is asking the Parties to waive notice. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms was continued to May 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Confirming Title Of Real Property To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Moallem and Sean Kenney for Peachie Nacario, Paul Nacario and Jose Nacario (Co-Trustees). Jill Dodd Guardian Ad Litem for Minor Beneficiaries.

Ms. Moallem stated that Mr. Nacario verified the 850 Petition. Ms. Dodd stated that she waives direct notice to the four Minors regarding the 850 Petition. The Court granted the Petition Confirming Title of Real Property to Trust (subject to review of the order). The Court stated that it would be helpful to have a declaration from the Guardian Ad Litem consenting to the Trust and questioned the different provisions for the Minors. Counsel spoke of the Trustor's intent, addressed the issue of whether Maya needs a Guardian Ad Litem, the Trust being silent as to bond, the Trustees being okay with bond being set, the Trustee having power to sell Trust assets, Jacob not being a minor and receiving his $50,000.00 share outright, Julia's share going into an account, keeping the assets in the Trust being better for the Family and the Beneficiaries for the assets to be protected, etc. The Petition for Order Approving Modification to Trust Terms was continued to March 11, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for appointment for a Guardian Ad Litem for Julia and for redrafting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
